name: Beef Salad Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Capers, drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1) Trim the pot roast of all fat and gristle; julienne pieces should be 1/4 inch to 2 inches long.
2) In a small mixing bowl, combine the vinegar, salt, pepper, and mustard. Whisk in the oil until the mixture is emulsified or well blended. It will separate after standing. Add the capers, garlic, and half the parsley.
3) Pour the dressing over the meat, mix carefully. Cover and marinate for 3 hours or more. Serve on a shallow platter garnished with tomatoes, gherkins, sliced eggs, onions, and remaining parsley.
